title: Chunar Fort
tagline: Chunar Fort — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: The Chunar Fort (also known as Chandrakanta Chunargarh and Charanadri) is located in Mirzapur district of Uttar Pradesh, in India.
overview.description: The Chunar Fort (also known as Chandrakanta Chunargarh and Charanadri) is located in Mirzapur district of Uttar Pradesh, in India. The fort and Chunar town, near Mirzapur city, are two historic places with common history and legends. The fort is located 34 kilometres (21 mi) northwest of Mirzapur. The southeastern part of the fort is on the rocky bank of the Ganges River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chunar Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chunar Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chunar Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chunar Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chunar Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chunar Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Chunar Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chunar Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Raipuria, Chunar, Chaudharipur, Bakiabad, Baqiabad, Delhi.
